heading: General officers ceasing to occupy positions commensurate with grade
label: 20243 General officers ceasing to occupy positions commensurate with grade
notes: Amendments2024—Subsec. (a)(3). struck out “as a” after “held by the officer”.Pub. L. 118–159
amendments: Amendments2024—Subsec. (a)(3). struck out “as a” after “held by the officer”.Pub. L. 118–159

children.text: Transfer the officer in grade to the Space Force retired list, if the officer is qualified and applies for the transfer.
Transfer the officer in grade to a Space Force inactive status, if the officer is qualified.

Discharge the officer from the officer’s appointment and, if the officer is qualified and applies therefor, appoint the officer in the grade held by the officer before the officer’s appointment in a general officer grade.
Discharge the officer from the officer’s appointment.

children.heading: .—Credit for Service in Grade
children.label: b .—Credit for Service in Grade
children.text: An officer who is appointed under subsection (a)(3) shall be credited with an amount of service in the grade in which appointed that is equal to the amount of prior service in an active status in that grade and in any higher grade.
